ddls:
CREATE TABLE "star_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star being observed */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "matched_stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars matched in the observation */,
  "total_neighbouring_stars" INTEGER /* Total number of neighbouring stars in the image */,
  "false_stars" INTEGER /* Number of false stars in the observation */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for the observation */,
  "observing_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions during the observation */,
  "exposure_time" REAL /* Exposure time of the observation */,
  "filter_used" TEXT /* Filter used during the observation */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image captured */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the observation data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the observation data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "star_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pattern */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star associated with the pattern */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Type of pattern (e.g., periodicity, correlation) */,
  "pattern_description" TEXT /* Description of the pattern */,
  "pattern_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the pattern */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used to identify the pattern */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used to identify the pattern */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the pattern data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the researcher */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of affiliation (e.g., university, research institute) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the researcher's data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who published the work */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication appeared */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the publication data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
column_names: ID of the star being observed
Number of stars matched in the observation
Total number of neighbouring stars in the image
Number of false stars in the observation
ID of the instrument used for the observation
Last date the observation data was updated
